message:
🐛 Show immediate feedback when Update Now is clicked

Previously there was a gap between clicking Update Now and the first
WebSocket progress message. The button went back to idle with no
visible indication anything was happening.

Now: clicking triggers an immediate "Starting update..." banner with
a progress bar at 5%, which transitions to real WebSocket progress
once kc-agent starts broadcasting.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -518,6 +518,7 @@
       "helmDisabled": "Auto-update not available for Helm installs",
       "helmDisabledDesc": "Use 'helm upgrade' to update your cluster deployment",
       "updating": "Updating...",
+      "startingUpdate": "Starting update...",
       "updateComplete": "Updated successfully",
       "updateFailed": "Update failed",
       "devMode": "Dev Mode",
